backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing hosting plans, accounts, and access control with functions to view plans, purchase plans, and retrieve user/account data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to implementation files, components, and test IDs with high‑level metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file including pages, hooks, stores, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining OKLCH color tokens and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point that loads the React app via main.tsx and mounts it into the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, layout with header/footer, and handles user session/logout logic.
frontend/src/components/QRCode.tsx: Canvas-based placeholder QR generator rendering a hash-based pattern with simple finder markers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor, reinitializing on identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity loading, login, logout, and status states. Wraps Dfinity AuthClient with custom behavior and exposes a hook for consuming auth state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile and hosting plan data via an actor. Includes functions for saving a profile, purchasing plans, and retrieving purchased plans.
frontend/src/index.css: Contains Tailwind base, component, and utility layers plus custom theme variables and UI styles. Adds Minecraft‑themed components, hero background, and global styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app, setting up QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering App. Imports global styles.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Handles login via Internet Identity and prompts users to set up a profile if none exists. Redirects authenticated users to the plans page and manages login/profile state.
frontend/src/pages/PanelPage.tsx: Displays the hosting panel for authenticated users with plan details and simulated server metrics. Redirects users without identity or plan and shows loading or error states accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Manages payment flow for a selected hosting plan, generating UPI payment data and confirming purchases via backend mutation. Redirects based on auth and plan state and finalizes payment completion.
frontend/src/pages/PlansPage.tsx: Renders the plans selection page, enforces identity check, and lets users pick a plan to proceed to payment.
frontend/src/state/orderStore.ts: Zustand store persisting selected plan and payment state with setters and a reset function.
frontend/src/utils/upi.ts: Generates a UPI payment URL string based on a plan and payment method.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters using query strings, hashes, and sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, animations, and plugins for the app's styling.
project_state.json: JSON snapshot describing project requirements, completed features, and pending feature requests.
